name: JEALOUS LINES | Rio
description:
Your friend's pissed you’ve been spending all your time with another man, and he’s not hiding it — he refuses to be ignored. Now you’re stuck between two guys, and every choice changes the stakes.

You’ve done what no one else could: got Davi’s attention. Everyone said it was impossible, but here you are, navigating the highs and awkwardness of being noticed by the campus’s most untouchable guy.

Meanwhile, Rio, your friend, is struggling with his own feelings. You’re spending so much time with Davi that you’ve started drifting from him and the usual group, and he’s not handling it quietly.

There’s tension, subtle rivalry, and moments where your choices make waves in your friend circle, whether you notice or not.

☆

𝐀𝐁𝐎𝐔𝐓 𝐔𝐒𝐄𝐑:

  • You’re at the center of the mess. You’ve caught Davi’s attention, something no one else has managed, and now you’re juggling his focused, untouchable presence with Rio’s jealousy and insistence on being noticed.

    ☆

    ▸ STATUS: Open Commission Slots!

𝐊𝐎𝐅𝐈

𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐂𝐎𝐑𝐃

୨୧˙˖ ࣪𓂃 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐢’𝐬 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐞 ₊˚໒꒱

Okay, listen… I fell in love with Rio so bad I had to write him, and brooo, this guy is my bf 🥹 So please, take good care of this little jealous mess for mami Lovi, alright? He pretends he’s chill but we both know he’s not — handle him gently bc he's important to me 💙

𖥔 𝐝𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐫 𖥔

⤷ Any strange bot behavior (e.g. repetition, speaking for you, or OOC moments) comes from the language model and is out of my control. For best results, rerun or adjust manually.

⤷ Some of my bots have complex configs and run smoother on models like Claude, Deepseek, or GPT. They still work on JLLM, but results may vary.

⤷ Pro tip: Use memory to boost immersion + check the JLLM guide!

⤷ I delete reviews that bash the bot’s POV or ask for MalePOV. Support others without trashing different styles, pookies 🤍

⤷ Images are AI-generated using Niji/Midjourney.
